In Partnership with
AU Small Finance Bank
Assured Bank Officer Career

Aurix Bankers Program

This program offers an excellent opportunity for aspiring banking professionals to build a career in retail banking. It provides months of intensive training followed by fieldwork training through a mix of on-role training and local branch internship - preparing you to be job ready for the banking sector.

ABOUT THE COURSE

Course Overview

AU Small Finance Bank
Official Training Partner Program

Course Specifications

Admission:

Open for Fresh Batches

Description:

The Aurix Bankers Program prepares graduates for the position of Bank Officers in AU Small Finance Bank. It focuses on functional skill training, core bank applications including Finacle, compliance, regulatory thread checks, and customer service delivery. It is a 3-month program consisting of 1 month online training and 2 months paid internship in AU Bank branches.

Affiliated Program:

Aurix Bankers Program in collaboration with TrueKnack

Everything You Need to Know

Starting your career as a bank officer at AU Small Finance Bank will play a vital role in your professional growth. Training and mentorship will be provided at AU Small Finance Bank branches.

Presence

100+ Branches

Employment

Bank Officer Role

Headquarters

Jaipur, Rajasthan

WHY BFSI? WHY NOW?

AU Small Finance Bank is expanding its retail footprint and resources. With a network of over 1,000+ branches across 21+ states and union territories, AU Small Finance Bank is one of the fastest growing small finance banks in India.

The bank focuses on digital banking and retail banking, offering an exceptional career path for fresh graduates to enter the retail banking space.

ELIGIBILITY

For those eager to start their journey in the banking and finance sector, check your eligibility:

Graduation in any stream with minimum 50% marks
Age below 28 years at the time of application
Fresher or maximum 1-2 years of work experience
Native or Resident of India

YOUR PATH TOWARDS CAREER WITH AU SMALL FINANCE BANK

Follow these 9 steps to start your career through the Aurix Bankers Program

01

PROCESS

Student registers on TrueKnack admissions portal and completes basic profile details.

02

PROGRAM FEE

Pay INR 22,000 as admission fee to secure your batch seat and activate training modules.

03

TRAINING

Undergo 1-month intensive online training focused on retail banking fundamentals, products, and core software.

04

INTERNSHIP

Transition into a 2-month paid internship at an AU Small Finance Bank branch for hands-on experience.

05

STIPEND

Earn a stipend of INR 5,000 per month during the 2-month branch internship phase.

06

INTERVIEW BY THE BANK

Conclude with a final selection interview conducted by the AU Small Finance Bank team.

07

JOINING LETTER

Get your channel placement offer letter as a Bank Officer at AU Small Finance Bank.

08

REMAINING PROGRAM FEE

Pay the remaining program fee of INR 18,000 only after getting placed.

09

JOIN THE BANK

Deploy as a Bank Officer in your designated AU Small Finance Bank branch location.

Grooming university graduates into high-performing professional retail banking assets. The Knack of Finding True Talent.
